channel.title: Nextcloud on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Nextcloud on Arrans github.io

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: laurent22/joplin
item.description: Joplin - the secure note taking and to-do app with synchronisation capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

item.title: dweymouth/supersonic
item.description: A lightweight and full-featured cross-platform desktop client for self-hosted music servers

item.title: pbek/QOwnNotes
item.description: QOwnNotes is a plain-text file notepad and todo-list manager with Markdown support and Nextcloud / ownCloud integration.

item.title: martinrotter/rssguard
item.description: Feed reader (and podcast player) which supports RSS/ATOM/JSON and many web-based feed services.

item.title: 42wim/matterbridge
item.description: bridge between mattermost, IRC, gitter, xmpp, slack, discord, telegram, rocketchat, twitch, ssh-chat, zulip, whatsapp, keybase, matrix, microsoft teams, nextcloud, mumble, vk and more with REST API (mattermost not required!)
